hard_boundaries: scanner artifacts are intake evidence only
P0 optimizes expected_value_of_information, not expected trade PnL
candidate-matched after-cost proof is required for edge claims
no runtime SSH, restart, rebuild, deploy, service, or env mutation
no PG read/write/DDL/migration or Timescale policy mutation
no IPC listener/writer, Decision Lease acquisition, or adapter/writer enablement
no Bybit REST/WS public or private contact
no official exchange MCP install, start, connect, credential read, private read, or order path
no order, probe, cancel, modify, cancel-all, fee-rate private read, or /v5/order endpoint
no inheritance from standing Demo authorization, prior no-order approvals, prior Bybit public GET approvals, or current trading P0 TODO context
no Cost Gate change, proof promotion, model serving promotion, or _latest overwrite
no cron, daemon, launchd, systemd, sidecar, scheduler, or hidden background loop
RetentionGuardian P0 is dry-run manifest only and performs no delete/move/apply
